channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Moped driving on pavement, 2nd July
item.description:
Delivery driver using footpath to make a delivery

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rangers Square, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass and window frame, 2nd July
item.description:
Broken glass strewn across pavement only yards from primary school entrance. Safety hazard It’s opposite No 123A Wyndcliffe Rd

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Intersection traffic road signals need improvement as the junction is chaotic, hazardous, confusing, congested and causes delays to public transport bus services and needs improved road signage for safety and improved traffic control., 2nd July
item.description:
Intersection traffic road signals need improvement as the junction is chaotic, hazardous, confusing, congested and causes delays to public transport bus services and needs improved road signage for safety and improved traffic control.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath taken over by delivery riders during Improvements, 2nd July
item.description:
Junction of Maple Rd and High St Delivery riders recklessly on mopeds and ebikes taking over pavement/pedestrians right of way at all times since improvement works commenced . Seen some incidents already in which pedestrian been nearly runned over which constitutes a risk for serious injuries and civil liability. This issue has to be monitored very closely by the council Environment & Public Protection/Transport Engagement Team. Enforcement of these type of issues need immediate attention and to be prosecuted for endangering the public and residents.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 201 - 203, Maple Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Intersection traffic road signals need improvement as the junction is chaotic, hazardous, confusing, congested and causes delays to public transport bus services and needs improved road signage for safety and improved traffic control., 2nd July
item.description:
Intersection traffic road signals need improvement as the junction is chaotic, hazardous, confusing, congested and causes delays to public transport bus services and needs improved road signage for safety and improved traffic control.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Moped on pavement, 2nd July
item.description:
Delivery driver mounted and drove on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rangers Square, Greenwich

item.title: Intersection traffic road signals need improvement as the junction is chaotic, hazardous, confusing, congested and causes delays to public transport bus services and needs improved road signage for safety and improved traffic control., 2nd July
item.description:

item.title: Leak in to.road from.manhole cover, 2nd July
item.description:
The water is pooling and this is causing pot holes to appear

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hawthorn Grove, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Moped driving on pavement, 2nd July
item.description:
Delivery drive drove on pavement to make delivery

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rangers Square, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement blocked by tree growth, 2nd July
item.description:
The trees in Hurst Road are getting so overgrown that they are now encroaching into the parking spaces and outside number 90 the growth almost blocks the pavement. I can see this was reported on 6th June but nothing has been done

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Hurst Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mopeds mount and drive on pavement, 2nd July
item.description:
Delivery drive mounted and drove on pavement to make a delivery

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rangers Square, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mopeds drive and park on pavement, 2nd July
item.description:
Delivery drivers routinely mount pavement to make deliveries

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rangers Square, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: GV59FMD Abandoned vehicle, been parked for 2 years, not moved, 2nd July
item.description:
The vehicle has no tax, no mot, not moved for 2 years
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gipsy Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clear water consistently bubbling through asphalt on the road, 2nd July
item.description:
This has been an ongoing issue for several months, its been gradually getting worse, sometimes more than other but definitively there is an underground busted pipe because the water is clear. I'm afraid that potentially lead to a sink hole. Is not related to current works being carried out but it seems to be more persistent including the amount of running water down the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 201 - 203, Maple Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 2nd July
item.description:
Flytipping of plastic bags previously reported there is now further rubbish been added to the bush & grass area backing off to the railway including planks of wood at approx 19:00 on 02/07
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malpas Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Reacurring Fly tipping, 2nd July
item.description:
Often people fly tip in this location it gets very messy. Whose job is it to clean and deal with it?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thanet Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branches to low, 2nd July
item.description:
Overgrown hedges. Danger to passing pedestrians especially mothers with young children and prams. Risk of being hit by vehicles especially lorries.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Cambridge Road, Southbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish fly tipped in alley, 2nd July
item.description:
Every few days more rubbish are added.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elmdene Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree leaning on my fence., 2nd July
item.description:
The tree is permanently squeaking against my fence. It has broken my picket fence and is forcing my normal fence apart.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Seward Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Reported by a member of the pubic, 2nd July
item.description:
Calling to report a tree in Croydon Road Recreation ground. Tree has a huge split down the middle and caller is concerned about passerbys safety. The tree is on the Croydon Rd side and is facing the tennis ground/Café. Address details - 319 Croydon Rd, Beckenham BR3 3FD
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
